input.question: Show the breakdown of course types for each department

payload.question: Show the breakdown of course types for each department

output.sql:
SELECT
  department AS department,
  course_type AS course_type,
  COUNT(course_id) AS course_count,
  SUM(COUNT(course_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY department) AS dept_total,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(course_id) / SUM(COUNT(course_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY department), 1) AS percent_of_department
FROM courses
GROUP BY department, course_type
ORDER BY department, course_count DESC;

visualization.description: Stacked normalized bar chart showing the breakdown of course types within each department.
visualization.title: Course Type Breakdown by Department

payload.sql:
SELECT
  department AS department,
  course_type AS course_type,
  COUNT(course_id) AS course_count,
  SUM(COUNT(course_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY department) AS dept_total,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(course_id) / SUM(COUNT(course_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY department), 1) AS percent_of_department
FROM courses
GROUP BY department, course_type
ORDER BY department, course_count DESC;
